name: Chocolate Almond Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer with a paddle attachment, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Mix together eggs, egg whites, and vanilla extract in a separate bowl.
3. Gradually add the egg mixture to the flour mixture, blending on low speed until combined.
4. Toss almonds with chocolate chips, then add them to the flour mixture and blend just until combined.
5. On a well-floured surface, roll the dough into two logs measuring 2 inches in diameter.
6. Place the logs on a greased baking sheet and brush with beaten egg.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until light golden brown. Allow to cool for 15 minutes.
8. Cut the cooled logs into slices on the bias.
9. Place the slices on a greased baking sheet and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until toasted.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
Yield: 2 logs/24 total pieces
